settings.content: Controls the SAVE90 launch-edition discount surfaces (PDP card, sticky bar, cart drawer reminder). Mike must also create SAVE90 in Shopify admin → Discounts as a £90 fixed-amount-off code with £179.99 minimum order. Framing is 'UK Spring Launch — limited promotional pricing'. STRATEGIC DEFAULT: cold traffic enters the PDP without auto-applying — they see the £179.99 anchor and copy/type SAVE90 manually for the conversion lift. Auto-apply is reserved for warm traffic (retargeting, email automation, abandoned-cart) by linking through /discount/SAVE90?redirect=… directly — that flow is unchanged regardless of this setting.

settings.label: Force auto-apply SAVE90 on every first visit (NOT recommended)
settings.info: OFF (default): cold visitors see £179.99 anchor + SAVE90 copy code on the PDP, type at checkout. Warm/recovery URLs (/discount/SAVE90?redirect=…) still auto-apply for those audiences. ON: every first-time visitor is redirected through /discount/SAVE90 — overrides the cold-traffic strategy. Only enable to revert to the original auto-apply behaviour.

settings.label: Hair + Skin Duo bundle handle
settings.info: Product handle of the Shopify Bundles app product that combines Cap + Face Mask. Tier 2 of the cap PDP picker adds this single bundle product to cart. If blank or invalid, Tier 2 falls back to multi-item POST (cap + face mask as separate line items).
